name: Scope 2 GHG emissions (market-based)
businessDefinition:
Scope 2 greenhouse gas emissions computed using the market-based method (equity share approach preferably used). See also (EU) 2016/1011 Annex III (1)(e)(ii).
Linked to Regulation (EU) 2022/1288, Annex I, Table 1, Adverse sustainability indicators 1, 2, 3
